 Changelog for package fmi_adapter
 ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
 
+2.1.2 (2023-04-13)
+------------------
+* Updated link to lifecycle_node.hpp.
+* Updated include get_env.h to env.h.
+* Contributors: Ralph Lange
+
 2.1.1 (2021-06-11)
 ------------------
 * Adapted to statically typed parameters introduced in Galactic.

data.author: Zarnack
data.message:
Added function 'getValue' to return value of any given variable name (#5)

* add getParameterValue function;
Signed-off-by: Sebastian Zarnack <s.zarnack@gmail.com>

* add getParameterValue function;
Signed-off-by: Sebastian Zarnack <sebastian.zarnack@eas.iis.fraunhofer.de>

* fixed formatting
Signed-off-by: Sebastian Zarnack <sebastian.zarnack@eas.iis.fraunhofer.de>

* fixed missing whitespaces
Signed-off-by: Sebastian Zarnack <sebastian.zarnack@eas.iis.fraunhofer.de>

* changed functionname from getParameterValue to getValue
Signed-off-by: Sebastian Zarnack <sebastian.zarnack@eas.iis.fraunhofer.de>

Co-authored-by: Sebastian Zarnack <sebastian.zarnack@eas.iis.fraunhofer.de>
